app.name: 자모들

app.description: Learn Korean by building real words.

level-mode.subtitle: 30-step program — rotation, merge, and word building.

korean-match.subtitle: Drag letters to build Korean words.

progress.hardUnlock: {{count}} more word(s) in Korean Match to unlock

levelMode.title: Level Mode
levelMode.subtitle: 30 levels — learn rotation, merge, and word building step by step.
levelMode.tutorialSubtitle: Tutorial sandbox — try the level program.
levelMode.requiredNote: Finish the first lessons to unlock the rest of the app.
levelMode.onboardingBanner: Welcome! Complete these lessons to get started.

intro.name: Welcome
intro.lesson: Get oriented with jamo tiles and how Korean Match works.

place.name: Placement
place.lesson: Drag jamo into the right slots to build syllables.

rotate.name: Rotation
rotate.lesson: Rotate jamo tiles to change vowel orientation — ㅏ vs ㅓ, ㅗ vs ㅜ.

merge.name: Vowel merge
merge.lesson: Combine simple vowels into compound vowels like ㅗ + ㅏ = ㅘ.

word.name: Word building
word.lesson: Put syllables together to spell real Korean words.

review.name: Review
review.lesson: Practice what you learned in the previous levels.

l01.title: Welcome to 자모들
l01.desc: Korean words are built from jamo — consonants and vowels. You will drag them into slots to make syllables, then words.

l02.title: Place jamo in slots
l02.desc: Each syllable has slots for consonants and vowels. Drag a jamo from the dock into an empty slot.

l03.title: Rotate jamo
l03.desc: Some jamo can rotate — a horizontal vowel becomes vertical, or vice versa. Select a tile, then tap Rotate.

l04.title: Merge vowels
l04.desc: Compound vowels are made by merging two simple vowels. Drag one vowel onto another compatible vowel.

l05.title: Build your first word
l05.desc: Combine completed syllables to spell a short Korean word. Check your answer when every slot is filled.

tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Learn drag, rotate, merge, compound vowels, and word building.
tutorial.mergeFirst: Fill both merge slots, then tap Merge.

placeSo.title: Build 소
placeSo.body: Drag each jamo from the dock into the matching slot.

placeGam.title: Add a final consonant — 감
placeGam.body: Korean syllables can end with a 받침. Place ㄱ, ㅏ, and ㅁ to make 감.

rotateVowel.title: Rotate a vowel
rotateVowel.body: Select ㅏ and tap Rotate until it becomes ㅗ, then drag it into the slot.

rotateConsonant.title: Rotate ㄱ and ㄴ
rotateConsonant.body: ㄱ and ㄴ can swap places. Rotate ㄱ into ㄴ, then build 나.

merge.title: Merge vowels
merge.body: Put ㅏ and ㅣ in the merge machine, tap Merge, then place the result.

compoundVowel.title: Compound vowels — 과
compoundVowel.body: Some syllables use two vowel parts (복모음). Place ㄱ, then ㅗ on top and ㅏ below to make 과.

solveSagwa.title: Build 사과
solveSagwa.body: Use everything you learned to build 사과. Tap Check when every slot is filled.

solveHwasal.title: Final challenge — 화살
solveHwasal.body: Build 화살. You may need to rotate jamo — try turning ㅜ into ㅗ for 화.

multiplayer.title: Multiplayer
multiplayer.subtitle: Pick a friend and choose how you want to play.
multiplayer.addFriendsHint: Add friends from your profile with a friend code.
multiplayer.raceDesc: Play at the same time — first to finish the word wins.
multiplayer.turnDesc: Same word · Easy 30s, Normal/Hardcore 60s per turn · opponent sees your results when the timer ends.
multiplayer.wordChainDesc: Take turns · 20 seconds · dictionary-valid words only.

streak.milestone3: 3-day streak! You are building a great habit!
streak.milestone7: 7-day streak! One week of Korean learning!
streak.milestone30: 30-day streak! You are a Korean learning champion!

progress.title: Progress & Streaks
progress.resetBody: This will delete your learning progress, streak data, unlocked badges, and completed word counts. Your settings will be kept.

data.localNote: Progress and settings are stored on this device. Cloud sync is not enabled yet.

wordle.hardLocked: Complete more words in Korean Match to unlock Hard Mode.
wordle.hardLockedTitle: Hard Mode is for confident learners.
wordle.hardLockedFooter: Recommended after Level 5 in Korean Match.

game.modalLossSub: Check the answer and try again.
game.dailySubtitle2: Today's two-letter word · same puzzle for everyone
game.dailySubtitle3: Today's three-letter word · same puzzle for everyone
game.hardSubtitle: Word structure is hidden · figure it out yourself
game.practiceSubtitle2: Two-letter Korean word · guess by consonants and vowels
game.practiceSubtitle3: Three-letter Korean word · guess by consonants and vowels
game.dailyFooter: Today's Daily resets at midnight (KST). You have 6 guesses.
game.practiceFooter: Feedback by jamo. Guess a {{n}}-letter Korean word in 6 tries.
game.hintCardUsed: Hint card used — one jamo revealed!
game.howToPlayDailyIntro: Daily mode: everyone gets the same {{n}}-letter word today.
game.howToPlayBody:
Guess a {{n}}-letter Korean word.
Scoring uses consonants and vowels separately.

Green = exact jamo in that slot
Orange = in the word but another slot (e.g. ㄱ anywhere turns yellow)
Gray = that jamo type is not in the word

No final consonant = 2 slots; with batchim = 3 slots.
Hint buttons (bottom left): syllable hint (1 token) · meaning hint (2 tokens).
You have 6 guesses!
